task_description: generate a report of all file extensions sorted by frequency
code:
echo "Cleaning up paths in report..."
awk '{if ($2 !~ /^\//) print $0}' file_extension_report.txt > cleaned_file_extension_report.txt
echo "Cleaned report saved to cleaned_file_extension_report.txt"

trace.stdout:
Cleaning up paths in report...
Cleaned report saved to cleaned_file_extension_report.txt

messages.content:
```bash
echo "Starting file extension frequency report generation."
find . -type f | awk -F. 'NF>1 {print $NF}' | sort | uniq -c | sort -nr > file_extension_report.txt
echo "Report generated and saved to file_extension_report.txt"
```
